title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Language Clinic: Python Exception Hierarchy
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python exception hierarchy increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.
Use Counter, defaultdict, deque, ChainMap, and named records when their specialized behavior matches the task.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
